scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/routes dist/middleware dist/services dist/db && cp routes/package.json dist/routes/package.json && cp middleware/package.json dist/middleware/package.json && cp services/package.json dist/services/package.json && cp db/package.json dist/db/package.json
scripts.migrate:test: NODE_ENV=test npm run knex -- migrate:latest --env test
scripts.seed:test: NODE_ENV=test npm run knex -- seed:run --env test
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate:rollback -- --all && npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.db:reset-dev: npm run migrate:rollback -- --all --env development && npm run migrate:dev && npm run seed:dev
scripts.db:reset:test: NODE_ENV=test npm run knex -- migrate:rollback --all --env test && npm run migrate:test && npm run seed:test
